text.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) Generation and Maintenance Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the requirements-traceability methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Q2 RTM run → 98% needs with tests / 95% tests with needs → 1 orphan need (NFR-0007 perf) + 1 orphan test (TC-0210) → impact analysis on CHG-0004 propagates via RTM in CI gate.
